codeReview.summary: The fix directly closes the prior observability gap. The rejected-line case now places an allow-listed write before the disallowed `rm` and asserts `/shared/x` stays exactly unchanged, so partial pre-rejection execution would now fail the test.

summary: Pass. Commit 395f141 changes the rejected VAL-CROSS-009 line from read-only pre-`rm` segments to `echo PARTIAL > /shared/x && rm -rf /shared/`, then checks both exact content equality and absence of `PARTIAL` (`packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-hardening.test.ts:627,672-677`). That makes partial pre-rejection execution observable and resolves the round-1 blocker identified on `error-and-abort-hardening`; within the scope of this remediation review, this closes that remaining blocker.
